linkedin.label: General LinkedIn automation
linkedin.description: Fetch profiles, search people and companies, send messages, manage connections, create posts, and more.

network-growth.label: Lead pipeline (import → qualify → invites)
network-growth.description: Two-phase LinkedIn lead pipeline: import + qualify leads against an ICP, then send connection invites on a schedule across one or more accounts.

optional.prompt: Enable the background scheduler now (sends invites on a schedule)?
optional.label: Installing background scheduler
